prompt: 用GPTImage2进行创作。请先用读文件能力查看参考图 E:/claude-workspace/jianglin/assets_hd2d/style/style-board.png，生成时严格复刻它的风格、视角、光照与密度（如果图片工具支持参考图输入则把它作为参考图传入）。Vertical portrait pixel art illustration, aspect ratio 9:16 (tall), a COMPLETE post-apocalyptic survivor camp seen in 3/4 top-down view at about 30 degrees, Octopath Traveler inspired HD-2D pixel art, golden dusk light from upper-left with long soft shadows baked into the scene. The whole camp fits inside the frame, bounded by a scrap-wood fence, overgrown wasteland grass and rubble outside the fence fading into soft blur at the very top. Inside the camp, densely packed, NO empty bare ground anywhere: a tall scrap-steel radio tower with satellite dish and red beacon light standing on a corrugated shack base (upper left), a glass greenhouse with rusty steel frame and green crops visible inside (upper middle), a squat concrete bunker with heavy steel door and sandbags (upper right), a wooden watchtower on four stilts with tarp canopy and a small red flag (middle right), a makeshift communal kitchen shack with corrugated iron roof, hanging pots, barrel stove and crates (center), vegetable garden plots with tomatoes, cabbages and one pumpkin (bottom), and a stone campfire ring with glowing orange embers but NO tall flame (center-left plaza). Every building has a human-scale door about the same height for scale consistency. Clear packed-dirt walking paths connect every building, the campfire plaza and the camp gate at the bottom fence. Scattered props along paths: rusty oil barrels, wooden crates, water tank on stand, tilted solar panel, old tires, debris piles, wooden benches, clotheslines. All remaining ground covered with dry grass tufts, moss patches, gravel and stones. Muted warm palette: dusty brown, rust orange, faded olive, weathered grey-teal accents. Crisp clean pixel clusters. IMPORTANT: absolutely NO people, NO characters, NO animals, NO rising smoke, NO text, NO watermark, NO UI elements.
